creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
(In reply to Jason E. Hale from comment #1)

Hey Jason, completely understand. I myself was stressing out, and frantically making efforts to extend the life of qmc2 on FreeBSD some days before the initial deadline, a number of things fall by the wayside when this happens.

Thanks for looking at this. I will be sync with main and update my patch.
